{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2015
|other_titles    = 
|image           = File:Copa do Brasil 2015 logo.png
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = Official logo.
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = 8 February – 2 December<ref>[http://cdn.cbf.com.br/content/201410/20141008231023_0.pdf CRONOGRAMA DAS COMPETIÇÕES DO FUTEBOL BRASILEIRO/2015] (in Portuguese).</ref><ref>[http://cdn.cbf.com.br/content/201410/20141008230955_0.pdf CALENDÁRIO DO FUTEBOL BRASILEIRO 2015] (in Portuguese).</ref>
|num_teams       = 87
|champions       = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] {{small|(3rd title)}}
|runner-up       = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]]
|matches         = 158
|goals           = 417
|top goal scorer = {{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gabriel Barbosa|Gabriel]]<br> <small>(8 goals)</small>
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2014 Copa do Brasil|2014]]
|nextseason      = [[2016 Copa do Brasil|2016]]
}}
The '''2015 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''2015 Copa [[Sadia]] do Brasil''' for sponsorship reasons)<ref>{{cite web|url=http://exame.abril.com.br/marketing/noticias/sadia-assina-naming-rights-da-copa-do-brasil|title=Sadia assina naming rights da Copa do Brasil|work=exame.abril.com.br/|language=pt}}</ref> was the 27th edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]] football competition. The competition was contested by 87 teams, which qualified either by participating in their respective state championships (71), by the [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF Rankings]] (10), by qualifying for the [[2015 Copa Libertadores]] (5) or having the best [[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2014 Série A]] record (excluding those qualified for [[2015 Copa Libertadores]]). The latter 6 clubs entered the competition in the 4th stage. The best six teams of the [[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2014 Brazilian Championship]] eliminated until the [[2015 Copa do Brasil#Third Round|third round]] qualified for the [[2015 Copa Sudamericana]].

The competition was won by [[Palmeiras]], which earned their third title by defeating fellow [[São Paulo (state)|São Paulo]] club [[Santos FC|Santos]] in a [[penalty shoot-out (association football)|penalty shootout]].

==Format==

The competition was a [[single elimination]] [[knockout tournament]] featuring [[two-legged tie]]s. In the first two rounds, if the away team won the first match by two or more goals, it progressed straight to the next round avoiding the second leg. The [[away goals rule]] was also used in the Copa do Brasil, but not for the finals.<ref name="Regulamento" >{{cite web|url=http://www.cbf.com.br/noticias/campeonato-copa-brasil-masculino/confira-o-regulamento-definitivo-da-copa-do-brasil-2015|title=Confira o regulamento definitivo da Copa do Brasil 2015|work=cbf.com.br/|date=2015-01-09|language=pt}}</ref> The winner qualifies for the [[2016 Copa Libertadores]].

==Qualified Teams==
The teams (in bold) were qualified directly for the fourth stage (round of 16).

==Draw==
A draw by CBF for the first round was held on December 16, 2014. The 81 qualified teams were divided in eight pots (A-H) with 10 teams each. They were divided based on the CBF rankings and the matches were drawn from the respective pots: A x E; B x F; C x G; D x H. The lower ranked teams of each match hosted the first leg. Before the round of 16 there was another draw including the six teams directly qualified to the 4th round.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.cbf.com.br/noticias/campeonato-copa-brasil-masculino/sorteio-da-copa-do-brasil-sera-amanha-as-11-horas-na-cbf|title=Sorteio da Copa do Brasil será hoje, às 11 horas, na CBF|work=cbf.com.br/|language=pt}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.cbf.com.br/noticias/campeonato-copa-brasil-masculino/confrontos-da-primeira-fase-definidos|title=Confrontos da primeira fase definidos|work=cbf.com.br/|language=pt}}</ref>
*[[CBF ranking]] shown in brackets.

{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Alecrim Futebol Clube|Alecrim]] (161)<br />
{{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Murici Futebol Clube|Murici]] (202)<br />
{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Capivariano Futebol Clube|Capivariano]] (–)<br />
{{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Amadense Esporte Clube|Amadense]] (–)<br />
{{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Piauí Esporte Clube|Piauí]] (–)
|}

==Preliminary round==
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Real Noroeste]]'''|Espírito Santo|4–2|[[Atlético Acreano]]|Acre|1–0|3–2}}
|}

===Preliminary match===
{{football box
|id = Atlético Acreano v Real Noroeste
|date=February 8, 2015
|time=19:30 [[UTC−02:00]]
|team1=[[Atlético Acreano]] {{flagicon|Acre}}
|score=0–1
|report=[https://int.soccerway.com/matches/2015/02/08/brazil/copa-do-brasil/atletico-acreano/real-noroeste-capixaba-fc/1977409/?ICID=PL_MS_01 Report]
|team2={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]
|goals1=
|goals2=[[Sidevaldo Pereira dos Santos|Sidevaldo]] {{goal|39}}
|stadium=[[Arena da Floresta]], [[Rio Branco, Acre|Rio Branco]]
|attendance=481
|referee=Fledes Rodrigues Santos ([[Federação de Futebol do Estado de Rondônia|Rondônia]])
}}
----
{{football box
|id = Real Noroeste v Atlético Acreano
|date=February 22, 2015
|time=16:30 [[UTC−03:00]]
|team1=[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]] {{flagicon|Espírito Santo}}
|score=3–2
|report=
|team2={{flagicon|Acre}} [[Atlético Acreano]]
|goals1=[[Stênio Garcia Dutra|Stênio]] {{goal|14||20||40}}
|goals2=[[Ailton Oliveira da Silva|Ailton]] {{goal|50}} <br> [[Jeferson Silva dos Santos|Jefferson Parrudo]] {{goal|69|o.g.}}
|stadium=[[Estádio José Olímpio da Rocha]], [[Águia Branca, Espírito Santo|Águia Branca]]
|attendance=778
|referee=Alexandre Vargas Tavares de Jesus ([[Federação de Futebol do Estado do Rio de Janeiro|Rio de Janeiro]])
}}
''Real Noroeste won 4–2 on aggregate.''

==First round==
{{main|2015 Copa do Brasil First Round#First round|l1=2015 Copa do Brasil First Round}}

{{TwoLegStart}}

|}

==Copa Sudamericana qualification==
The best six teams eliminated before the round of 16 with the best [[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2014 Série A]] or [[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|2014 Série B]] record (excluding those directly qualified for the Round of 16) qualified for [[2015 Copa Sudamericana]].
{{col-begin|width=100%}}
{{col-2}}
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Pos !! Team !! Final status !! 2014 season
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|1 || [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] || ''Round of 16'' || 7th ([[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|Série A]])
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|2 || [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] ||  Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 8th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|3 || [[Santos FC|Santos]] || ''Round of 16'' || 9th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|4 || [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] || ''Round of 16'' || 10th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|5 || [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 11th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|6 || [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 12th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|7 || [[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]] || ''Round of 16'' || 13th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|8 || [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] || ''Round of 16'' || 14th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|9 || [[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 15th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|10 || [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] || ''Round of 16'' || 16th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|11 || [[Joinville Esporte Clube|Joinville]] || Eliminated <small>''(first round)''</small> || 1st ([[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|Série B]])
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|12 || [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 2nd (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|13 || [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] || ''Round of 16'' || 3rd (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|14 || [[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 4th (Série B)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|15 || [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] || Eliminated <small>''(second round)''</small> || 17th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ccffcc
|16 || [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] {{Cref2|1}} || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 18th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|17 || [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 19th (Série A)
|-bgcolor=#ffcccc
|18 || [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] || Eliminated <small>''(third round)''</small> || 20th (Série A)
|}

{{col-2}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=2|Key to colors on the table
|-
|bgcolor=#ccffcc style="width: 20px;"|
|align=left|Qualified
|-
|bgcolor=#ffcccc style="width: 20px;"|
|align=left|Not qualified
|}
{{col-end}}

{{Cnote2 Begin|liststyle=disc}}
{{Cnote2|1|n=0|'''2015 Copa do Nordeste:'''
*As champions of the [[2015 Copa do Nordeste]], [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] were qualified for [[2015 Copa Sudamericana]]. They qualified also for 2015 Copa do Brasil round of 16 losing their Copa Sudamericana berth. For this reason, [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] qualified for the 2015 Copa Sudamericana as 2015 Copa do Nordeste best team (runners-up) eliminated before round of 16.<ref>{{cite web|title=Copa do Nordeste de 2015 REC - Reulamento Especíco da Competiçao|url=http://cdn.cbf.com.br/content/201501/20150121151612_0.pdf|publisher=CBF}}</ref>
}}
{{Cnote2 End}}

==Knockout stages==
{{main|2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages}}

The draw for the knockout stages was held by CBF on 4 August 2015. The 16 qualified teams were divided in two pots. Teams from pot 1 were the six teams directly qualified to the round of 16, the five teams that competed at the [[2015 Copa Libertadores]] and the best placed team in the [[2014 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2014 Brazilian Série A]] not taking part in the 2015 Copa Libertadores, plus the two highest [[CBF ranking|CBF ranked teams]] qualified via the third round. Pot 2 was composed of the other teams that qualified through the third round. Each pot was divided into 4 pairs according to the CBF ranking. For the remaining stages of the tournament another draw was held on 31 August 2015.<ref name="Regulamento" />

===Seeding===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!width="190"|Pot 1
!width="190"|Pot 2
|-
|
* {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] (1)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] (2)
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] (3)
* {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] (4)
* {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] (6)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] (7)
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]] (8)
* {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] (9)
|
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]] (5)
* {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] (12)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] (13)
* {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] (14)
* {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] (19)
* {{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]] (21)
* {{flagicon|Pará}} [[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]] (34)
* {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Ituano FC|Ituano]] (139)
|}

| RD3 = [[#Semifinals|Semifinals]]
| RD4 = [[#Finals|Finals]]

| RD4-score01-2 = 1 | RD4-score02-2 = 2

}}

===Round of 16===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ituano FC|Ituano]]|São Paulo|1–4|'''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''|Rio Grande do Sul|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Internacional v Ituano|0–2]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Ituano v Internacional|1–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]|Ceará|2–4|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''|São Paulo|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#São Paulo v Ceará|2–1]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Ceará v São Paulo|0–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]|Minas Gerais|3–5|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''|São Paulo|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Palmeiras v Cruzeiro|1–2]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Cruzeiro v Palmeiras|2–3]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|2–1|[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Flamengo v Vasco da Gama|1–0]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Vasco da Gama v Flamengo|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]|Pará|2–4|'''[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Fluminense v Paysandu|1–2]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Paysandu v Fluminense|1–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''|Rio Grande do Sul|4–1|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]|Paraná|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Coritiba v Grêmio|1–0]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Grêmio v Coritiba|3–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]'''|Santa Catarina|3–2|[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]|Minas Gerais|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Atlético Mineiro v Figueirense|1–1]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Figueirense v Atlético Mineiro|2–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]|São Paulo|1–4|'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''|São Paulo|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santos v Corinthians|0–2]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Corinthians v Santos|1–2]]}}
|}

===Quarterfinals===

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]|Rio de Janeiro|1–4|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''|São Paulo|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#São Paulo v Vasco da Gama|0–3]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Vasco da Gama v São Paulo|1–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''|São Paulo|4–2|[[Figueirense FC|Figueirense]]|Santa Catarina|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Figueirense v Santos|1–0]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santos v Figueirense|3–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''|São Paulo|4–3|[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]|Rio Grande do Sul|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Internacional v Palmeiras|1–1]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Palmeiras v Internacional|3–2]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]|Rio Grande do Sul|1–1 ([[Away goals rule|a]])|'''[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]'''|Rio de Janeiro|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Fluminense v Grêmio|0–0]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Grêmio v Fluminense|1–1]]}}
|}

===Semifinals===

{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Santos FC|Santos]]'''|São Paulo|6–2|[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]|São Paulo|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#São Paulo v Santos|3–1]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Santos v São Paulo|3–1]]}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''|São Paulo|3–3 (4–1 [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|p]])|[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]|Rio de Janeiro|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Fluminense v Palmeiras|1–2]]|[[2015 Copa do Brasil knockout stages#Palmeiras v Fluminense|2–1]]}}
|}

===Finals===
{{Main|2015 Copa do Brasil Finals}}
{{Football box
|id="id1"
|date=November 25, 2015
|time=22:00 [[UTC-03:00|DST: UTC−02:00]]
|team1=[[Santos FC|Santos]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score= 1–0
|report=[http://globoesporte.globo.com/sp/santos-e-regiao/futebol/copa-do-brasil/jogo/25-11-2015/santos-palmeiras/ Report]
|team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
|goals1=[[Gabriel Barbosa|Gabriel]] {{goal|78}}
|goals2=
|stadium=[[Estádio Urbano Caldeira|Vila Belmiro]], [[Santos, São Paulo|Santos]]
|attendance=14,116
|referee=Luiz Flávio de Oliveira ([[Federação Paulista de Futebol|São Paulo]]) {{small|(replaced by Marcelo Aparecido de Souza ([[Federação Paulista de Futebol|SP]]) - 67')}}
}}
----
{{Football box
|id="id2"
|date=December 2, 2015
|time=22:00 [[UTC-03:00|DST: UTC−02:00]]
|team1=[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score= 2–1
|report=[http://globoesporte.globo.com/sp/futebol/copa-do-brasil/jogo/02-12-2015/palmeiras-santos/ Report]
|team2={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]]
|goals1=[[Dudu (footballer, born 1992)|Dudu]] {{goal|56||84}}
|goals2=[[Ricardo Oliveira]] {{goal|86}}
|stadium=[[Allianz Parque]], [[São Paulo]]
|attendance=39,660
|referee=[[Héber Lopes]] ([[Federação Catarinense de Futebol|Santa Catarina]])
|penalties1=[[Zé Roberto]] {{pengoal}}<br />[[Rafael Marques Mariano|Rafael Marques]] {{penmiss}}<br />[[Jackson de Souza|Jackson]] {{pengoal}}<br />[[Jonathan Cristaldo|Cristaldo]] {{pengoal}}<br />[[Fernando Prass]] {{pengoal}}
|penaltyscore=4–3
|penalties2={{penmiss}} [[Marquinhos Gabriel]]<br />{{penmiss}} [[Gustavo Henrique (footballer, born 1993)|Gustavo Henrique]]<br />{{pengoal}} [[Geuvânio]]<br />{{pengoal}} [[Lucas Lima (footballer, born 1990)|Lucas Lima]]<br />{{pengoal}} [[Ricardo Oliveira]]
}}

|-
!2015 Copa do Brasil<br>Champions
|-

|-
|'''[[SE Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''<br/>'''3rd title'''
|}
